docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, ROBIN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: ANATOLY SEDLER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED MAY-13-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-21-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-21-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY. PLAINTIFF ROBIN WILSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANATOLY SEDLER IS PRESENT. HONORABLE JUDGE PRO TEM MCGARY FINDS THAT CASE CSM 19-860288 AND CSM 19-860289 SHOULD BE HEARD AT THE SAME TIME AS THEY ARE THE SAME CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAIVES CLAIM AMOUNT OVER THE $10000 LIMIT OF THIS COURT TO CONTINUE IN THIS COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-21-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILSON, ROBIN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC. THIS IS A CORRECTED JUDGMENT: ACTION CONSOLIDATED WITH SMALL CLAIMS CASE NO. CSM-19-860289 STYLED AS ROBIN WILSON VS. 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY WILSON, ROBIN 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WILSON, ROBIN AS TO DEFENDANT 3884 STONERIDGE, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILSON, ROBIN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-21-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAY-17-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
